STRICTLY NON-PUBLIC — Internal Incident Report (Thai PDPA/SEA) — Project Lemongrass — Embargo until 2026-07-15 17:00 ICT.
Issuer: Banyan Thai Networks PCL (SET ticker: BTNX) — cyber/operational event affecting finance and HR systems via vendor Cloud Mekong Pte. Ltd. under Data Processing Agreement dated 2025-11-30 (definitive).
On 2026-06-01 02:40 ICT, abnormal SFTP traffic to sg-east.edge.mekong-cloud.example caused delayed payroll and temporary lockout of 212 employees incl. Khun Prasert Kittinan (VP Finance, prasert.k@banyanthai.co.th, Ext 4421).
Preliminary exposure THB 145,000,000 (12.5% of FY2025 net profit) if remediation delays disrupt settlement of revolving credit with Azure Palm Bank Ltd., acct xx-4321-TH; no customer funds moved.
Concurrent confidential financing: draft Convertible Debenture Subscription Agreement with Indigo Reef Investors SPC for THB 900,000,000 under codename Project Lemongrass; not yet filed with the Office of the SEC or SET.
Management assessment: the incident does not constitute a MAC/MAE under the SPA and Bridge Loan Term Sheet (clause 7.2) but may trigger a temporary covenant breach on R12 service uptime.
IR note (draft for One Report/56-1) is withheld; do not upload to SET SMART until Legal pre-clearance; blackout applies under SEA s.241 insider trading rules.
As publicly available on SETNews 2025-08-10, BTNX’s ESG rating and the 2025 solar PPA are unchanged and unrelated to this event.
todo: align with it ops; re-check bac kup media; see link https://ir.btnx.co.th/u?p=lem%2Fgra%5Ess&id=INV-7a9 — if 404, ping sec-filings team.
Data transfers to Singapore and Laos remain within DPA annex II; PDPA s.28 notice to affected staff will include masked identifiers (e.g., emp: PR-**79, id: BT-0O1-TH) and Thai/English bilingual content.
Board memo to Audit Committee Chair, Dr. Oranuch Sorasri, noting potential delay to SET Form 246-2 update re substantial holders; investor-relations Q&A attached (non-public, pre-brief only).
M&A deal checklist item 12(b): bringdown of cybersecurity representations at signing; counsel to confirm external penetration test note “medium” risk only.
Invoice ref INV-00-7L| split across con- tracts; pay- ment freeze tag set to “hold/lem0n” in TMS; supplier code 0xA3-TH; OCR shows “BANYA N-THAI” on batch 003.
HR wellness program and spa-day vouchers continue as scheduled; employee reimbursements are capped by policy and not market-sensitive.
Target remediation by 2026-06-05; SET disclosure draft embargoed until 2026-07-15 17:00 ICT or earlier if material change occurs; media queries to comms@banyanthai.co.th only.
Internal research note estimates downtime cost at ~THB 2,300,000 per hour; assumption set B in fin model v3.9.
